lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. It is mechanically functional but shows noticeable wear and tear. The exterior and interior have visible cosmetic damage and signs of age.
Poor condition.

Step into luxury with this absolutely pristine vehicle that looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! In mint condition, every detail has been meticulously maintained to perfection, from the flawless exterior to the spotless interior. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a car in top-tier, like-new shape. It’s ready to provide a premium driving experience for its next owner!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant work to be roadworthy. The exterior shows its age with several large dents, noticeable rust along the rocker panels, and clear coat failure on most surfaces. Inside, the cabin has seen heavy use; the seats are torn, several plastic trim pieces are missing, and the electronics are temperamental. Mechanically, the engine starts but has a noticeable knock, and the brakes are quite soft. This would be an ideal project for a dedicated hobbyist or a valuable source of spare parts. It is being sold strictly as-is.

This vehicle is in mint, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. The exterior paint is flawless, and the interior remains in pristine, like-new condition with no signs of wear. Mechanically, it performs perfectly, backed by a complete and up-to-date service history. Every feature works exactly as intended, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from a brand-new car. This is an exceptional example for a discerning buyer.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior and is in perfect running order. It has been exceptionally well-maintained.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and maintaining its original factory luster. Meticulously maintained and mechanically flawless, it represents an unparalleled opportunity for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality and investment-grade standards.

Hey everyone! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, and it’s been kept spotless and garage-stored. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

This E46 M3 is a masterclass in mechanical harmony, featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned double-VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential, ensuring linear power delivery. Significant preventative maintenance includes a reinforced rear subframe and updated rod bearings to ensure long-term structural and internal reliability. The suspension features upgraded bushings and dampers for razor-sharp turn-in, while the exterior and undercarriage remain in concours-level state. This is a turn-key collector-grade machine with zero deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive preservation, this vehicle stands in showroom-equivalent state. Meticulously kept in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster entirely free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and untouched, and every electronic feature operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefitting from a documented history of preventative maintenance and exceptionally low mileage. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a turn-key example that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a clean title.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of the highest caliber, showing no signs of wear and benefiting from a rigorous maintenance history. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this vehicle stands as a benchmark of automotive excellence and mechanical integrity.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in an unblemished state, exhibiting a showroom-quality finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously preserved and mechanically peerless, this offering caters to the most discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection.

Hey there! You honestly won't find a cleaner ride than this beauty. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, kept tucked away and pampered like a member of the family. It looks and drives just like it did the day it rolled off the lot—totally flawless inside and out! I'm so excited for the next owner to experience how incredibly smooth this is. Come take a look, you're going to fall in love!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 that exemplifies mechanical purity. This specimen features the high-revving S54 inline-six power plant, meticulously maintained with documented VANOS timing adjustments and rod bearing prophylaxis for absolute reliability. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock, ensuring visceral power delivery and optimal torque vectoring. The chassis remains structurally flawless with a reinforced rear subframe and factory-spec bushings, preserving the telepathic turn-in and lateral stability inherent to the platform. Finished in a deep, swirl-free gloss with a cabin featuring taut Nappa leather and functional instrumentation, this vehicle reflects a legacy of climate-controlled preservation and rigorous preventative maintenance. A
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Professional detail just completed.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of stone chips or swirl marks, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new, featuring supple, unscuffed leather, original factory floor mats, and that distinct 'new car' aroma. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, with a documented history of preventative maintenance and strictly original components. Every switch, sensor, and electronic feature functions with precision. This is a rare, collector-grade example intended for the buyer who demands perfection and a turn-key driving experience without compromise.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit presents in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernable wear and boasting a flawless mechanical pedigree. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of unrivaled preservation and mechanical integrity.

Presenting an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that remains in showroom state. Mechanically peerless and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and provenance.

Hey there! You honestly won't find another one like this—it's in absolutely stunning, showroom-ready condition. I've babied this car since day one, and it looks and drives just like it did when it first rolled off the lot. It's super clean, super reliable, and ready for a new home. Come take a look, you're going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a concours-level example of the legendary S54-powered platform. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features a meticulously maintained VANOS system and individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power through a crisp ZF 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis has undergone preventative subframe reinforcement and is fitted with a limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. Suspension geometry is dialed in with fresh bushings and factory-spec dampers, ensuring telepathic steering response. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero orange peel or rock chips. Mechanically robust and aesthetically flawless, this specimen represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering.
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Flawless interior. Full service history included.

This vehicle is an absolute standout, maintained in showroom condition and preserved with meticulous care. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of any chips or swirls, and has been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear, the carpets are spotless, and it has never been smoked in. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. Always garaged and driven only in fair weather, this car feels, smells, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. For the discerning buyer who demands perfection, this turn-key example is unparalleled.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in impeccable condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Both the aesthetic profile and mechanical integrity reflect a showroom-quality existence, offering an acquisition opportunity for the most discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than excellence.

Presented in pristine, showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously maintained interior, reflects an uncompromising standard of care. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than excellence.

Hi friends! I'm parting ways with my absolute gem of a car. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been babied since day one, always garage-kept, and drives like an absolute dream. I’m so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have—you won't find another one this clean!

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. This example features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precision Getrag 420G six-speed manual gearbox. Mechanically flawless, it has received comprehensive preventative maintenance including a VANOS overhaul, rod bearing replacement, and rear subframe reinforcement. The chassis remains rigid, supported by factory-spec suspension maintaining original damping characteristics. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the aesthetic condition is impeccable, showing zero oxidation or bolster wear. A turn-key performance icon for the discerning purist.
Pristine condition. Zero flaws. Garage kept. Clean title. Recent service. Ready for immediate sale.

Presented in absolute showroom condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning collector. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero chips or scratches, having been meticulously garage-kept and hand-washed throughout its life. Inside, the cabin retains that new-car aroma; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and every electronic component—from the infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a comprehensive, documented service history with all scheduled maintenance performed ahead of time. It drives with the same tightness and precision as the day it left the assembly line. This is a turn-key example that requires nothing but a new owner who appreciates perfection.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, presented in impeccable, showroom-ready condition. Meticulously maintained and free of any discernable wear, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a specimen of uncompromising quality. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the flawlessly preserved interior, confirms its status as an investment-grade asset.
